Footer.body: Mobile auto detailing for private customers and businesses in East Flanders.

HomePage.title: Showroom ready without losing your time.
HomePage.subtitle: Park&Wash comes to your home or location for private customers, SMEs and dealers. You get a clear proposal first, then planning is followed up personally.

handover.title: Hand over the key
handover.body: You do not need to move your car.

service.title: Mobile service
service.body: Detailing on location, matched to vehicle and space.

quote.title: Honest proposal
quote.body: Contact first, online booking after real availability.

previewPanel.label: Preview status
previewPanel.title: A credible site without a false booking promise.
previewPanel.body: Visitors can compare services and get in touch. Direct booking waits until server-confirmed availability is ready.

servicesIntro.title: Start with the service that fits your vehicle or fleet.
servicesIntro.body: The previews below come from published Supabase services. Prices stay admin-managed and are not hardcoded in the UI.

audiences.title: A preview for private cars and business vehicles.

private.title: Private customers
private.body: From careful basic cleaning to intensive detailing for a car that feels fresh again.

business.title: Businesses and dealers
business.body: Contact-first follow-up for fleet care, dealer-ready vehicles and recurring on-location cleaning.

process.title: Calm intake, careful work, clear follow-up.
process.body: The preview prepares the real workflow without pretending online reservation is already live.

inspect.title: Understand the vehicle and goal
inspect.body: The request starts with customer type, vehicle, desired service and practical planning.

detail.title: Deliver the right service
detail.body: Park&Wash focuses on visible results: interior, exterior, paint correction or protection.

followUp.title: Confirm planning honestly
followUp.body: Availability and appointment confirmation stay personal until the booking engine is live.

trust.title: Transparent
trust.body: Starting prices are visible, but each request is followed up honestly.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.body: The service comes to your home or location within the future service area.

business.title: For businesses
business.body: Fleet and dealer-ready requests get their own contact path.

finalCta.title: Tell us what your vehicle needs; Park&Wash follows up personally.
finalCta.body: This preview sends visitors to contact and quote intent. Online reservation appears only when real slots are safe server-side.

ServicesPage.title: Choose a service and request a quote or callback.
ServicesPage.body: This preview helps visitors find the right service. Online reservation comes later, once real availability is confirmed server-side.

particular.title: For your own car
particular.body: Choose a package as the starting point. Park&Wash adapts the exact approach to condition, goal and timing.

business.title: For companies and fleets
business.body: Use this path for fleet care, dealer-ready vehicles, test cars or recurring on-location maintenance.

notes.title: Preview content with honest boundaries.
notes.body: The service choice feels complete, but the site does not promise direct reservation yet.

points.published: Every displayed service comes from published Supabase service records.
points.quote: Each CTA leads to contact or quote intent, not to a fake checkout.
points.booking: The booking wizard stays closed until server-side availability and reservation are ready.

AboutPage.title: Mobile detailing from Melle, built on trust and precision.
AboutPage.body: Park&Wash is built for customers who want a cared-for vehicle without logistics. The service comes to the customer and works with clear agreements.

trust.title: Key-level trust
trust.body: Customers hand over the key only when communication is clear and the appointment is right.

precision.title: Detail focused
precision.body: The focus is visible result, clean finishing and an approach that fits the vehicle condition.

mobile.title: No detour
mobile.body: The car stays at home, at work or at the dealer while Park&Wash works on location.

process.title: From request to cared-for vehicle.
process.body: The preview makes the working method clear so visitors know what to expect.

listen.title: Understand first
listen.body: Park&Wash looks at customer type, vehicle, desired result and practical location.

prepare.title: Plan deliberately
prepare.body: The right service, duration and preparation are aligned before the appointment is fixed.

finish.title: Deliver cleanly
finish.body: The end result should be immediately visible: clean, cared for and ready to use.

PortfolioPage.title: Before and after work will get a strong place here.
PortfolioPage.body: The structure is ready for real projects without stock images or invented results. Until media is available, the page shows the categories that are coming.

interior.title: Interior cleaning
interior.body: Space for seats, mats, dashboard, door panels and detail finishing.

exterior.title: Exterior and paint
exterior.body: Space for hand wash, gloss restoration, paint corrections and protective finishing.

fleet.title: Fleet and dealer-ready
fleet.body: Space for business cases, multiple vehicles and sale-ready delivery work.

proof.title: Real projects come later, but navigation and categories are ready now.
proof.body: This preview avoids fake results and keeps the portfolio ready for approved images.
proof.cardBody: Send the condition, desired service and timing through contact. Park&Wash can propose the right approach.

ContactPage.title: Contact is the starting point for every request right now.
ContactPage.body: This preview groups quote, fleet and planning questions while the real lead form is still being connected server-side.

quote.title: Quote for one vehicle
quote.body: Describe the vehicle, its condition and the desired service so Park&Wash can estimate what is needed.

fleet.title: Business or fleet request
fleet.body: Use this path for multiple vehicles, dealers, test cars or recurring cleaning.

planning.title: Planning and region
planning.body: Exact availability is confirmed personally until the booking engine shows real slots.

intake.title: A clear contact point without fake submit.
intake.body: The page shows which information is needed and keeps privacy context visible before lead storage goes live.

form.title: Contact form
form.body: The form gets validation, rate limiting, bot protection and Supabase lead storage in a following slice.

phone.title: Phone follow-up
phone.body: Personal follow-up stays important for quick planning or business requests.

email.title: Message with details
email.body: Vehicle type, location, desired service and timing are the basis for a correct quote.

privacy.title: Privacy stays visible
privacy.body: The contact flow already shows why details are used and links to the privacy policy.

BookingPage.title: Online booking is not active yet.
BookingPage.body: Park&Wash is handling requests through contact or quote intent for now. The booking wizard only goes live once real availability and server-side reservation confirmation are ready.

PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.body: How Park&Wash handles personal data when you contact us or later request a booking.

controller.title: Controller
controller.body: Park&Wash processes the details you enter in public forms or share directly through contact.

data.title: Data we process
data.body: For contact requests this includes your name, contact details, message, customer type and possible company details. For bookings we may later also need address, selected service, date, time slot and practical notes.

purposes.title: Why we use data
purposes.body: We use data to answer your question, follow up quotes or appointments, plan a mobile service and meet legal or administrative obligations.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: We process form details based on your consent and, when an appointment or quote follows, to take pre-contractual or contractual steps.

sharing.title: Sharing and processors
sharing.body: Park&Wash does not sell personal data and does not share it with third parties for marketing. Technical providers such as hosting, database, email or security providers process data only to operate the website and administration.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Leads and appointment details are kept no longer than needed for follow-up, customer service, accounting and legal obligations. Test or incorrect data is removed when it is no longer needed.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can ask for access, correction, deletion, restriction or portability of your data. You can withdraw consent for future processing when consent is the legal basis.

security.title: Security
security.body: We limit access to personal data to allowlisted admins and use technical controls such as database security, server-side validation, rate limiting and bot protection for public forms.

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.body: Use the contact page to ask a privacy question or send a request about your personal data. We handle privacy requests as quickly as possible.

contact.title: Privacy for your question
contact.label: I agree that Park&Wash may use my details to respond to my question.
contact.notice: We use your name, contact details and message only to handle your request and follow up if needed. We do not share your details with third parties for marketing.
contact.error: Confirm your consent to send your message.

booking.title: Privacy for your request
booking.label: I agree that Park&Wash may use my details to respond to my request and follow up on a quote or callback.
booking.notice: We use your details only to handle your request, prepare a quote and contact you with questions. Online reservations will only be confirmed later through the server-side booking flow.
booking.error: Confirm your consent to continue your request.
